expectations.text: Template uses listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug for static secrets
expectations.evidence: Uses generic placeholder syntax '{{ secrets.api_key }}', '{{ secrets.database_url }}' rather than listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug function

expectations.text: Template uses dynamicSecret function for PostgreSQL credentials
expectations.evidence: Uses generic placeholder syntax '{{ dynamic.postgres.username }}', '{{ dynamic.postgres.password }}' rather than dynamicSecret function

expectations.text: dynamicSecret function has correct 5-arg signature (project-slug, env, path, name, ttl)
expectations.evidence: Does not use dynamicSecret function at all; uses generic template placeholder syntax

expectations.text: Shows .DB_USERNAME and .DB_PASSWORD fields from dynamic secret output
Mentions auto-renewal behavior (agent renews before expiration)
expectations.evidence: "Auto-renewal Mechanism: The agent monitors credential expiration and automatically renews...Renews when 75% of TTL has elapsed"
